title: Conference Session Schedule
scenario: Generate a schedule for a conference with multiple parallel sessions, each lasting 60 minutes. The schedule should include session titles, speaker names, room assignments, and start times. The schedule should be presented in a tabular format and should accommodate 15 sessions. The schedule should be suitable for a two-day conference.
constraints: Must include headers for Day 1 and Day 2
Must use a consistent format for session titles and speaker names
Must include a note for lunch and breaks

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the schedule adheres to the given constraints.
Check if the schedule is presented in a tabular format.
Check if the session titles, speaker names, room assignments, and start times are accurate and complete.
